channel.title: Qwen on DevOpsTales
channel.description: Recent content in Qwen on DevOpsTales

item.title: AI IDE Configuration Standards: From .vscode to AGENTS.md
item.description: As AI tools become more integrated into our development workflows, the way we configure our projects is changing. We’ve moved beyond simple .gitignore and .env files into a world where we need to provide specific “instructions” and “context” to our AI assistants.

item.title: The Best AI Coding CLIs in 2026: Claude Code, Gemini CLI, OpenCode, and Qwen Code CLI
item.description: While AI-native IDEs like Cursor and Windsurf have taken the developer world by storm, a parallel revolution has been happening in the terminal. AI Coding CLIs (Command Line Interfaces) offer a different paradigm: they are lightweight, terminal-native, and often more “agentic” than their GUI counterparts.
